underlying_goal: Fix various TypeScript/React errors, linting issues, and CI/CD configuration problems across a Travel Planner frontend project
friction_detail: The CI/CD workflow fix for excluding frontend/node_modules from Python linters took multiple attempts, with the user reporting continued errors twice before it was resolved.
brief_summary: User iteratively pointed out IDE errors and CI issues across their Travel Planner project, and Claude fixed them one by one, though the CI workflow exclusion fix required multiple attempts.
